variants.title: Filtrec RHR150G05V1/ESD Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR150G05V/3/ESD
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR150G05V1/ESD Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR150G05V/3/ESD
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR150G05V1/ESD. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR150G05V1/ESD provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Glass Fiber (Anti-Static), Outer Diameter: 52.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 22.2 mm, Length: 257.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.0 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 20 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +100°C, Media Type: Glass Fiber (Anti-Static), Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: MicroFit® MFHR54241 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR150G05V/3/ESD
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHR54241 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR150G05V/3/ESD
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHR54241 UltraGen III Return Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
